code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of Triple objects into a single coherent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping of predicates to phrase generators
    verb_map = {
        "areaOfWater": "has a water area of",
        "areaTotal": "covers a total area of",
        "country": "is in",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "stands at an elevation of",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "populationDensity": "has a population density of",
        "areaCode": "has area code(s)",
        "leaderTitle": "has the title of",
        "areaOfLand": "has a land area of",
        "leader": "is led by",
        "utcOffset": "has a UTC offset of",
        "populationTotal": "has a total population of",
        "postalCode": "has postal code(s)",
        "largestCity": "has its largest city as",
        "language": "speaks",
        "location": "is located at",
        "chairperson": "has chairperson",
        "headquarter": "has its headquarters at",
        "countySeat": "has its county seat at",
        "capital": "has capital",
        "demonym": "is inhabited by",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group",
        "state": "is in the state of",
        "populationMetro": "has a metropolitan population of",
        "type": "is a",
        "governmentType": "has a government type of",
        "timeZone": "lies in the time zone",
    }

    def phrase(triple: Triple) -> str:
        s, p, o = triple.subject, triple.predicate, triple.object
        # Special handling for a few predicates to improve naturalness
        if p == "capital":
            return f"{o} is the capital of {s}"
        if p == "isPartOf":
            return f"{s} is part of {o}"
        if p == "country":
            return f"{s} is in {o}"
        if p == "language":
            return f"{s} speaks {o}"
        # Default handling using verb_map
        verb = verb_map.get(p, p)
        return f"{s} {verb} {o}"

    # Generate a phrase for each triple, preserving input order
    phrases = [phrase(t) for t in triples]

    # Combine phrases into a single sentence
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
